NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: The app tracks anonymous data to improve user experience, we respect your privacy.
NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: The app uses your location to find doggies near you.
NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: The app allows you to choose photos for your doggie's profile.
NSCameraUsageDescription: The app allows you to take photos for your doggie's profile.

Localizable.strings.appIntents_startSwiping_description: Opens Pegada ready to meet new dogs.
